description_long: This rifle features a robust, cylindrical main body constructed primarily from matte black metal, with a prominent barrel extending from the front. The stock is a skeletonized, angular frame, likely designed for weight reduction and ergonomic handling. Blue cables and wiring are visible along the side, suggesting electronic or pneumatic components integrated into the design. The rifle includes a large, boxy trigger guard and a sturdy grip, both made from the same dark metal as the rest of the body. The muzzle is fitted with a device that appears to be a suppressor or compensator, and the overall build is industrial and tactical, suitable for urban operations. The sighting system is not clearly visible, but the top rail suggests compatibility with various optics.
description: A heavy, matte black rifle with a skeletonized stock, visible blue wiring, and a cylindrical barrel fitted with a muzzle device. The design is industrial and tactical, with a robust grip and trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical barrel, muzzle device, and the symmetry of the stock and grip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the skeletonized stock, blue wiring, and the full length of the barrel and grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the stock, the alignment of the barrel, and the trigger guard.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the wiring, the structure of the stock, and the details of the grip and trigger guard.
